street_definition: "What's the color on this one?" — what an operator actually KNOWS about an asset (verified by touch · comps · rent roll · seller motivation · financing market) as opposed to what's been pitched.
cre_operator_meaning: The qualified intel a senior broker accumulates by walking the building, pulling the rent roll, knowing the seller, knowing the buyer pool, knowing the debt market. No color · not a broker · a forwarder.
defendableos_definition: The verified-evidence layer that a Tribunal-grade engagement carries. Maps to the Proof of Process and Proof of Quality pillars of the 5-Proof framework. A deed without color is a claim · a deed with color is an attestation.
client_explanation: Color is what we KNOW about the asset · not what's been claimed. When we open an engagement on your behalf we build color by pulling independent sources · verifying numbers · talking to the market. The more color we have · the higher our confidence · the lower your risk. No color · no deed.
jr_broker_use: On every new engagement build a color file IMMEDIATELY · pull ≥2 independent comps · verify seller-reported numbers against EDGAR/CompStak/ATTOM/SwarmCurator CRE corpus · log every source · flag contradictions · escalate to sr broker if color is missing on a critical field before drafting the LOU.
sr_broker_use: Cross-reference jr-broker sources against the 1.5M+ graded pairs in PostgreSQL · challenge any claim with < 3 independent confirmations · discount stale color (> 30d) · weight sources via EntityScorer (EDGAR 0.90 · OpenAlex 0.85 · CRE News 0.65 · Reddit 0.50) · apply PASS doctrine when color contradicts the pitch by > 25%.

rule_layer_checks: color_status == MISSING on Class A engagement = PROPOLIS
tribunal_use.judge_layer_prompt_hint: Score color quality · weight into reasoning · drift ≤ 0.15 between Scale A/B

evidence_required: ≥ 3 independent source citations with timestamps + source weights
documentation of any contradictions in failure_modes
physical or live-equivalent site verification for Class A

failure_modes.description: Sources cited but don't actually confirm the claim
All sources older than 30 days · market has moved
Sources are only Reddit/HN/RSS · no EDGAR-grade
Sources contradict each other with no reconciliation
Color on tenant credit OR financing OR seller motivation is MISSING

scoring_impact.repair_lift: MEDIUM · SwarmFixer can sometimes add color post-hoc
scoring_impact.probability_of_close: HIGH · deals with strong color close 2-3× the rate
scoring_impact.evidence_strength: DIRECT · color evidence count IS evidence strength
scoring_impact.cost_to_mint: MEDIUM · gathering color costs energy · deficit color costs more

example: STNL acquisition · Lineage Logistics cold storage · Atlanta · seller pitched 6.0% cap on T-12 NOI $4.2M. Color built from EDGAR 10-K (0.90) + CompStak 3 comps (0.85) + ATTOM (0.85) + local broker phone (0.90) + SwarmCurator 12 historical comps (0.85). Color score 0.91 → Royal Jelly · Tribunal HONEY promoted to Royal Jelly · DDEED-DOV-CRE-LINEAGE-ATL-000042-v1 · saved buyer $2.6M on $42M asset by re-pricing to 6.4% cap.
defendableos_notes: Color is the ANTI-FANTASY mechanism in the PASS doctrine · compounds within a relationship · returning customers get pre-loaded color · maps directly to HoneyCard factory_path.
